history.content:
<thought>
The agent is at (7,4) facing north. The cell directly ahead (6,4) is lava, so moving forward is deadly. The cell to the right (7,5) is floor, which provides a safe path. I need to navigate towards the goal G at (5,6). Turning right will allow me to move east and then north to avoid the lava and walls.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is located two cells ahead and two cells to the left. The cell directly in front of me is empty floor, so I can move forward safely. This will bring me closer to the goal while avoiding lava to the left.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is located to the northwest, but there is lava directly to the left of the forward path. The cell directly in front is safe floor, but beyond that is a wall and lava to the left. The safest path is to turn left to face west, then move west twice to reach the cell directly below the goal, then turn right and move forward to reach the goal

<thought>
The goal G is located to the north-west of my current position. I am currently facing north. Directly north is a safe floor cell, but further north-west is blocked by lava. To reach the goal, I can move west twice then north. Therefore, I need to face west first. I will turn left to face west.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is currently facing north. The cell directly ahead is a floor cell ('.'), which is safe. The goal 'G' is located two rows north and one column east. Moving forward will bring us closer to the goal. There are no immediate obstacles in front. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is located to the north-east. The cell directly north (ahead) is a floor tile, safe to step on. Moving forward will bring me one step closer to the goal and away from the surrounding lava cells. After that, I can turn right to face the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly to my right (east) in the same row. My current facing direction is north (up), and the cell in front of me is a wall (#). To move onto the goal, I need to turn right to face east, then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>The goal G is directly in front of me one cell away. I can move forward to reach it. There are no obstacles in the forward cell.</thought>
<action>MOVE_FORWARD</action>
